title: matricaria parviflora
intro: Matricaria parviflora, also known as small flowered chamomile or dog fennel, is a perennial herb native to Eastern Europe and Asia, belonging to the daisy family. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds like apigenin and bisabolol, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Matricaria parviflora include its calming effects on the nervous system, relieving anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Matricaria parviflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications for skin conditions and wounds.
